flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Linn-Benton Community College fell 38% between 2006 and 2009 (16.9% → 10.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Linn-Benton Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $7.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Linn-Benton Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $15.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Linn-Benton Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
